title: Solicitor’s lien insufficient grounds to deny access to personal information
summary: A client sought access to her personal information from the lawyer who had been, but was no longer, representing her. Stating that his client owed him outstanding fees, the lawyer refused to give access to the requested information until her account with him was settled. In the lawyer’s opinion, allowing the client access to her file befo...
